node_6.subject: Klaus Mueller
node_6.description: This is Klaus Mueller's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 7:00 am, head to the library at Oak Hill College by 8:00 am, research and gather information for the gentrification paper from 8:30 am to 12:00 pm, take a lunch break at Hobbs Cafe from 12:00 pm to 1:00 pm, continue writing the research paper in the library from 1:30 pm to 4:30 pm, review and edit his work for an hour from 4:30 pm to 5:30 pm, have dinner at Hobbs Cafe at 5:30 pm, spend the evening relaxing or reading about social justice topics at home from 6:30 pm to 8:00 pm.
